instruction:
An online company sells handmade samurai katana swords. The website costs \$ 390 a month to maintain. Each katana costs \$ 215 to make, and they sell each katana for \$ 685. A. Create a linear model in the form $y=m x+b$ where $x$ is the number of swords sold per month and $y$ is the net monthly profit. [ANS]
B. Using this model, find the number of swords that would need to be sold per month to have a monthly profit of \$ 4170. [ANS]
